creator: adrian@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

Can you please test -head on your laptop and let me know how it goes?

I've done some pretty major surgery on AR9285 and related chipsets in
the-HEAD driver.


Adrian

On 9 April 2011 11:10, <adrian@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Synopsis: [ath] Atheros 9285 cannot register with wifi AP (timeout)
